messages.content: Uyu myitozo wo guhumeka uramfasha gutuza.
Kosora uti: "Iyi myitozo yo guhumeka iramfasha gutuza." Twahinduye "uyu" iba "iyi" kugira ngo ihuze n'ijambo "imyitozo," kandi "wo" iba "yo."

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=learner-correction-feedback. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-learner-correction-feedback-0055-bf8d8224.

messages.content: Amaherezo, umuceri n'ibishyimbo birahiye. How do I politely invite her to serve herself?
Wamubwira uti: "Ngaho ifate ku muceri no ku bishyimbo." This is a warm, polite way to say, "Please help yourself to the rice and beans."

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=conversation-practice. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-conversation-practice-0118-e17cccff.

messages.content: I prefer outdoor storytelling if it does not rain. How can I add that we will choose the hall if it rains?
Wavuga uti: "Niba imvura itaguye, tuzahitamo kuvugira inkuru hanze. Niba imvura iguye, tuzakina ikinamico mu nzu mberabyombi." Ibi bigaragaza neza amahitamo yombi kandi bigakomeza kuvuga ibizaba.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=conversation-practice. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-conversation-practice-0015-d376f95e.

messages.content: I thought Ndaruhutse means I am resting right now. Is that correct?

Not quite. Ndaruhutse means 'I have rested' or 'I feel rested,' so it describes the result. For an action happening now, say Ndimo ndaruhuka, meaning 'I am resting.' Contrast: Ndaruhutse neza uyu munsi. Ndimo ndaruhuka ubu.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=grammar-and-structure. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-grammar-and-structure-0040-b4315468.

messages.content: Reka ngerageze: "Komeza unyure mu nzira ngufi, hanyuma ufate umuhanda mugufi uri iburyo."
Ni interuro iboneye. "Inzira ngufi" na "umuhanda mugufi" byombi bifite ihuzanyito rikwiye. Your directions are short and clear.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=conversation-practice. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-conversation-practice-0089-85791d36.

messages.content: Translate into Kinyarwanda: "This year, I want to read two new books every month and write short summaries of them." Please explain one important choice.

"Uyu mwaka, ndashaka gusoma ibitabo bibiri bishya buri kwezi no kwandika incamake ngufi z'ibyo bitabo." I used "ibitabo bibiri bishya" because books, the number two, and new all have plural forms that agree. "Z'ibyo bitabo" also keeps the summaries linked to those same books.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=translation-with-explanation. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-translation-with-explanation-0055-1ccd72f4.

messages.content: Does the sentence say why the meeting was postponed or how many colleagues there were? Also, could "yasubitswe" mean "was canceled" here?

Oya, interuro ntivuga impamvu inama yasubitswe, kandi ntivuga umubare nyawo wa bagenzi bawe. It only shows that there was more than one colleague. Here, "yasubitswe" means "was postponed"; "was canceled" would be "yahagaritswe."

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=translation-with-explanation. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-translation-with-explanation-0071-de21feed.

messages.content: Dukina isaha imwe. Can gukina also mean to act in a play?
Yego. Gukina can also refer to acting: "Eric akina mu ikinamico y'ishuri." This means "Eric acts in the school play."

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=conversation-practice. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-conversation-practice-0119-b79b3aac.

messages.content: Iyo nzu narayikunze, ariko nashakaga no kuvuga ko nyuma nabajije niba ako gace gatekanye nijoro.
Wakomeza uti: "Iyo nzu narayikunze, ariko nyuma nabajije niba ako gace gatekanye nijoro." "Iyo nzu" yerekeza ku nzu wavuze iri hafi y'isoko, naho "ako gace" kagumya kwerekeza ku gace wasuye.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=multi-turn-consistency. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-multi-turn-consistency-0002-5a0b6b4c.

messages.content: Umukozi yavuze ko ibiro by'umuyobozi biri ku igorofa rya kabiri. Namubaza nte uko ngerayo mvuye ku muryango mukuru?
Mubaze uti: "Nagera nte ku biro by'umuyobozi mvuye ku muryango mukuru?" Ibi bikomeza kuvuga ibiro by'umuyobozi kandi ntibihimba inzira. Gahunda yawe y'inama iracyari saa tatu.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=multi-turn-consistency. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-multi-turn-consistency-0004-f03620e3.

messages.content: Now the clerk asks where my old document is. It is inside my bag. Should I say "Iri ku gikapu cyanjye"?
Vuga uti: "Iri mu gikapu cyanjye." Use "mu" because the document is inside the bag; "ku gikapu" would place it on the bag.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=conversation-practice. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-conversation-practice-0005-eb1f10cf.

messages.content: Please make a natural Kinyarwanda sentence about directions using the exact words "ikarita yanjye" and explain why "ikarita wanjye" sounds unnatural.

"Narebye ikarita yanjye, mbona ko hoteli iri hafi ya sitasiyo." This means, "I looked at my map and saw that the hotel is near the station." Use yanjye with ikarita; wanjye does not agree with that noun. Exact required phrase: "ikarita yanjye".

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=sentence-generation. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-sentence-generation-0005-5e2a18d2.

messages.content: At a shop, why can "Nashakaga iyi ihendutse" express a present choice? How is it different from "Ndashaka iyi ihendutse"?

Mu kiganiro n'umucuruzi, "Nashakaga iyi ihendutse" softens the present wish: "I would like the cheaper one." The context shows that the choice is current, not completed. "Ndashaka iyi ihendutse" is more direct: "I want the cheaper one." Contrast: "Nashakaga iyi ihendutse, niba bishoboka." versus "Ndashaka iyi ihendutse; ndayigura ubu." Here "iyi" refers to one item. For several items, the agreement changes: "Nashakaga izi zihendutse."

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=grammar-and-structure. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-grammar-and-structure-0006-634cf2ec.

messages.content: Niba nshaka amafoto menshi, mvuge nti: "Mwohereze amafoto"?
Yego, wavuga uti: "Mwohereze amafoto." Aha amafoto ni menshi, kandi interuro igabanywamo itya: Mwo-he-re-ze a-ma-fo-to. Imyandikire ya Mwohereze iguma ari ijambo rimwe.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=pronunciation-and-orthography. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-pronunciation-and-orthography-0009-6bd41f8f.

messages.content: Noneho nshaka kubanza kuzireba, hanyuma nkabaza igiciro. Nabivuga nte mu nteruro imwe?
Vuga uti: "Mwampa izi nkweto nkazireba neza, hanyuma mukambwira igiciro cy'izi nkweto, nyabuneka?" Iyi nteruro ikomeza gahunda yawe: kubanza kureba inkweto, nyuma ukabaza igiciro.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=multi-turn-consistency. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-multi-turn-consistency-0011-ea02b933.

messages.content: I need a message about tomorrow's conservation activity. Nanditse nti: "Ejo tuzaba..." ariko sinzi uko nkomeza.
What exactly will happen tomorrow, and who will receive the message: one friend or a community group? Ibyo bisobanuro birakenewe kugira ngo duhitamo amagambo n'urwego rw'ikinyabupfura bikwiye.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=register-culture-code-switching. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-register-culture-code-switching-0013-2966e4b1.

messages.content: Give me a short Kinyarwanda passage about a visit to a public office, then correct my misunderstanding that the visitor traveled by bus and received a certificate at 9:00 a.m. Include a stated return time, but leave the means of transport unspecified. Please also point out one relevant vowel spelling.

Passage: Ku wa Gatatu, Keza yageze ku biro by'umurenge saa tatu za mu gitondo. Yari aje gufata icyemezo cy'amavuko. Umukozi yamusabye kugaruka saa munani.

Correction: Keza arrived at 9:00 a.m., but the passage does not say that she received the certificate then. She was asked to return at 2:00 p.m. It also does not state how she traveled, so we cannot say that she used a bus. In "saa", both letters a must be written.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=reading-comprehension. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-reading-comprehension-0014-d111d60b.

messages.content: Mu nteruro "Nagiye mu nama y'abakozi," how should I spell and read "y'abakozi"? Should it be "ya bakozi"?

The standard spelling is "y'abakozi": "Nagiye mu nama y'abakozi." The apostrophe shows that the final "a" of "ya" is omitted before "abakozi." For reading practice, you can divide the written form as "y'a-ba-ko-zi" and read it smoothly as one connected expression. The apostrophe is a spelling mark, not a separate sound.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=pronunciation-and-orthography. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-pronunciation-and-orthography-0016-c09656a0.

messages.content: Mubyukuri ni raporo imwe gusa, iya mbere. Iya kabiri narayirangije. Nabikosora nte?
Vuga uti: "Aline, wabona akanya ukamfasha gusuzuma raporo ya mbere?" Dukuyemo raporo ebyiri kuko ubu ushaka ubufasha kuri raporo ya mbere gusa.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=multi-turn-consistency. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-multi-turn-consistency-0017-02cd0d30.

messages.content: Mpa interuro ebyiri zirimo ijambo "ubukonje."
Ushaka ko zombi zivuga ikirere, cyangwa ushaka ko "ubukonje" rikoreshwa mu bintu bibiri bitandukanye?

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=ambiguity-and-hallucination-resistance. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-ambiguity-and-hallucination-resistance-0018-33ae7785.

messages.content: How would I say the same thing more respectfully to an older colleague without changing the meaning?
Say: "Murakoze kumbaza. Ndaruhuka mu rugo kuko naniwe." The respectful tone comes from "Murakoze kumbaza," while the statement about you resting at home stays unchanged.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=register-culture-code-switching. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-register-culture-code-switching-0019-c73f7fab.

messages.content: Mpa interuro ivuga igikorwa cyo mu cyaro, irimo neza "mu murima" na "n'inka".
Umuhinzi yakoraga mu murima, maze umuhungu we anyura hafi aho n'inka. Nakoresheje neza "mu murima" na "n'inka".

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=sentence-generation. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-sentence-generation-0023-82ee70b2.

messages.content: Ndavuga abaturage bo muri aka gace. Ubu ntibabungabunga ishyamba.
Wavuga uti: Ubu, abaturage bo muri aka gace ntibabungabunga ishyamba. Ntibabungabunga ihuje impakanyi n'abaturage benshi. Nta gihe, mpamvu cyangwa kindi gikorwa nongeyeho kuko utabivuze.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=ambiguity-and-hallucination-resistance. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-ambiguity-and-hallucination-resistance-0024-9e474eb9.

messages.content: Nshaka kwandikira umuyobozi nti: "Hi, ndi working kuri raporo, then nzayohereza." Mwankosorera ubu butumwa?
Kubera ko wandikira umuyobozi, imvugo yubashye irakwiye. Ariko then ntisobanura neza intambwe ibanza: urabanza kwandika raporo, kuyisuzuma, cyangwa gukora ikindi?

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=register-culture-code-switching. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-register-culture-code-switching-0025-30df38a5.

messages.content: Nyuma yaho mvuga nti: "Iyo ndayinyoye, I start akazi." Nakuramo English nte, kandi iyo ivuga iki hano?
Vuga uti: "Iyo maze kuyinywa, ntangira akazi." Kubera ko uvuga gahunda ya buri gitondo, iyo hano means "when" or "whenever." Ntirimo kuvuga isaha runaka.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=multi-turn-consistency. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-multi-turn-consistency-0030-73d2a09f.

messages.content: Then I walk to work. Can you add that without making the sentence heavy again?
Yes: "Buri gitondo mbyuka saa kumi n'ebyiri, ngakaraba, ngafata ifunguro rya mu gitondo, hanyuma nkajya ku kazi n'amaguru." Hanyuma marks the final step clearly.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=multi-turn-consistency. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-multi-turn-consistency-0032-c0fa2946.

messages.content: None ndashaka kuvuga umusaruro wabonetse: The bean harvest was good.

Wavuga uti, Umusaruro w'ibishyimbo wari mwiza. Aha umusaruro ni ibishyimbo byabonetse nyuma yo gusarura, si igikorwa cyo gusarura. Bityo interuro ya mbere ikoresha gusarura, iya kabiri igakoresha umusaruro.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=ambiguity-and-hallucination-resistance. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-ambiguity-and-hallucination-resistance-0033-9b08105b.

messages.content: How can I rewrite “Landlord ari gukora repair y'inzu muri neighborhood yacu” in natural Kinyarwanda, and where should the apostrophe go?

Say: “Nyir'inzu arimo gusana inzu yo mu gace dutuyemo.” Here, gusana means “to repair,” and agace dutuyemo means “the area where we live.” In standard spelling, Nyir'inzu has an apostrophe. Another natural example is: “Igisenge cy'inzu kirava.”

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=vocabulary-definition-usage. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-vocabulary-definition-usage-0037-c9b70004.

messages.content: Nabonye amazu meza, ariko sinzi igihe yubatswe. Navuga ko yubatswe umwaka ushize?
Oya, ntuvuge umwaka ushize kuko utabizi. Vuga uti: "Nabonye amazu meza, ariko sinzi igihe ayo mazu yubatswe."

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=conversation-practice. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-conversation-practice-0044-e3c53bc2.

messages.content: Bisi igeze, nicaye ku ntebe iri imbere.
Birumvikana. Uburyo busanzwe kurushaho ni: "Bisi imaze kugera, nicaye ku ntebe y'imbere." Wayivuyemo ugeze he?

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=conversation-practice. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-conversation-practice-0046-934c1596.

messages.content: Niba icyo gikorwa twaramaze kukivugaho, nakoresha 'icyo'? Kandi noneho ndabwira abantu babiri.
Yego. Vuga uti: 'Mwamfasha muri icyo gikorwa?' 'Mwa-' ibwira abantu babiri, naho 'icyo' kigaruka ku gikorwa mwamaze kuvugaho. Igikorwa kiracyari kimwe.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=register-culture-code-switching. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-register-culture-code-switching-0046-b400c993.

messages.content: Interuro "Mbere nziga Icyongereza, hanyuma nyuma nzashaka akazi" irumvikana nabi. Wayikosora kandi ukayihindura mu Cyongereza?

Interuro karemano ni: "Mbere na mbere nziga Icyongereza, hanyuma nzashaka akazi." Translation: "First I will study English, and then I will look for a job." I removed "nyuma" because "hanyuma nyuma" repeats the same sequencing idea; "hanyuma" already means "then."

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=translation-with-explanation. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-translation-with-explanation-0053-023c91e5.

messages.content: Ndabaza inshuti imwe dusanzwe tuvugana bisanzwe. Nanditse nti: "Mumbwire, nyogokuru wawe araza ryari?" I mean, "Tell me, when will your grandmother come?"

Vuga uti: "Mbwira, nyogokuru wawe azaza ryari?" "Mbwira" addresses one close friend informally; "mumbwire" is respectful or plural. I also changed "araza" to "azaza" because you are asking about a future arrival.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=learner-correction-feedback. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-learner-correction-feedback-0053-b8aba7d3.

messages.content: None se navuga nte ku isupu imwe no ku masupu menshi?
Wavuga uti: “Isupu imwe irashyushye,” naho ku bwinshi uti: “Amasupu menshi arashyushye.” Iyo “isupu” ihindutse “amasupu,” “irashyushye” na yo ihinduka “arashyushye.”

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=grammar-and-structure. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-grammar-and-structure-0055-9215a87a.

messages.content: How would I politely say, "I chose the buses because they leave early"?
Wavuga uti: "Nahisemo bisi kuko zihaguruka kare." Here you mean multiple buses, so "zi-" in "zihaguruka" refers back to them. If you meant one bus, you would say: "Nahisemo bisi kuko ihaguruka kare."

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=grammar-and-structure. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-grammar-and-structure-0057-2925f9eb.

messages.content: Mu nkuru yanjye nshaka kuvuga ibikorwa bizaba ejo. Nakoresha nte igihe kizaza, kandi nahakana nte igikorwa kimwe?

Mu gihe kizaza, inshinga igira -za-: Ejo nzandika igice cya nyuma cy'inkuru. Iyo tuvuga abantu benshi, tuvuga tuti: Ejo tuzandika igice cya nyuma cy'inkuru. Bitandukanye na Ubu ndandika, kuko icyo gikorwa kiri kuba ubu. Mu guhakana uvuga uti: Ejo sinzandika igice cya nyuma cy'inkuru.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=grammar-and-structure. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-grammar-and-structure-0058-1f053dda.

messages.content: Inzu yanjye iri hafi y'isoko. My neighbor has a garden. Nabivuga nte?
Vuga uti: “Umuturanyi wanjye afite ubusitani.” Here, wanjye means “my” because it describes umuturanyi.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=multi-turn-consistency. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-multi-turn-consistency-0064-0ab02920.

messages.content: Nshaka icyemezo bibiri by'amavuko by'abana banjye.
Vuga uti: "Nshaka ibyemezo bibiri by'amavuko by'abana banjye." Icyemezo kimwe gihinduka ibyemezo byinshi. Murakoze kubisobanura; ubu birumvikana ko mushaka ibyemezo bibiri by'amavuko.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=conversation-practice. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-conversation-practice-0065-604e9da6.

messages.content: Good. I also want to ask everyone to bring water for that game. Can you give me the final message?
Dore ubutumwa bwa nyuma: "Nshuti zanjye, tuzakina umupira w'amaguru ku Cyumweru saa kumi. Buri wese azane amazi yo kunywa. Muzaze dukine!"

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=multi-turn-consistency. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-multi-turn-consistency-0067-082d6884.

messages.content: Navuga nte mu Kinyarwanda aho kuvuga ngo "Mfite appointment saa cyenda"?

Wavuga uti: "Mfite gahunda saa cyenda." Iyo ushaka kugaragaza uwo muzabonana, wavuga uti: "Mfitanye gahunda na mugenzi wanjye saa cyenda." "Gahunda" ishobora kuba icyo wateganyije muri rusange, ariko "gufitanya gahunda" akenshi byumvikanisha ko abantu bumvikanye igihe cyo kubonana.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=vocabulary-definition-usage. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-vocabulary-definition-usage-0068-062aef5d.

messages.content: How should I translate "I am visiting my aunt today" if I mean that I plan to visit her later today? Please contrast it with a habitual visit.

For the planned visit, say: "Uyu munsi ndajya gusura masenge." Kinyarwanda expresses the intended trip naturally with "ndajya gusura," rather than copying the English form word for word. Contrast: "Nsura masenge buri cyumweru" means "I visit my aunt every week," so that sentence describes a habit.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=grammar-and-structure. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-grammar-and-structure-0070-d081dc82.

messages.content: Mu gihe cy'imvura, umuryango yacu uguma mu rugo iyo imvura igwa. I mean, "During the rainy season, our family stays home when it rains."

A natural correction is: Mu gihe cy'imvura, umuryango wacu uguma mu rugo iyo imvura igwa. Change yacu to wacu because umuryango takes wacu. The rest of your sentence already expresses the intended meaning clearly.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=learner-correction-feedback. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-learner-correction-feedback-0076-02a79d08.

messages.content: Please translate "Inama nshya zizatangira ejo saa tatu" and clarify why it uses zizatangira rather than izatangira.

It means: "The new meetings will start tomorrow at nine o'clock." Inama nshya zizatangira ejo saa tatu. Here, nshya and zi- show that inama is plural. For one meeting, you would say inama nshya izatangira.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=translation-with-explanation. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-translation-with-explanation-0093-f9dbc258.

messages.content: How do I say that we are planning a community clean-up but are revising the start time? Please explain the present-tense vocabulary.

Say: "Turategura umuganda wo ku wa Gatandatu, ariko turahindura igihe cyo gutangira." This means, "We are organizing Saturday's community work, but we are changing the start time." "Gutegura" is to organize or prepare; "guhindura" is to change. If you mean "intend" rather than "organize," use "guteganya": "Duteganya gutangira saa mbiri."

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=vocabulary-definition-usage. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-vocabulary-definition-usage-0101-24bc1459.

messages.content: Murakoze. For several exercises, navuga nti: "Mwanyereka imyitozo, ndabinginze?"
Yego, iyo nteruro irakwiye kandi irimo ikinyabupfura. "Umwitozo" is one exercise, and "imyitozo" is the plural form.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=conversation-practice. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-conversation-practice-0106-0960b2fb.

messages.content: Nashatse kuvuga ko nahamagaye mushiki wanjye ejo, ariko nshyiramo ijambo ry'Icyongereza risobanura we. Nabivuga nte mu Kinyarwanda gusa, kandi uhamagarwa agaragarira he mu nshinga?

Vuga uti: Namuhamagaye ejo. Agace mu kari muri namuhamagaye gasimbura umuntu umwe uhamagarwa, yaba umukobwa cyangwa umuhungu. Iyo uvuga bashiki bawe benshi, wavuga uti: Nabahamagaye ejo; muri uwo mwanya ba ibasimbura. Ushobora no kuvuga izina aho kurisimbuza: Nahamagaye mushiki wanjye ejo.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=grammar-and-structure. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-grammar-and-structure-0113-93bf9856.

messages.content: Ndagereranya umuganda na igitaramo. Ntekereza ko umuganda ariwiza.

Igitekerezo cyawe kirumvikana. Kosora ibintu bibiri: "Ndagereranya umuganda n'igitaramo. Ntekereza ko umuganda ari mwiza." Andika "n'igitaramo," si "na igitaramo," kandi "ari mwiza" ni amagambo abiri.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=conversation-practice. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-conversation-practice-0130-7068048b.

messages.content: None se, navuga nte ko igitaramo ari cyiza ku rubyiruko kurusha umuganda?
Wavuga uti: "Igitaramo ni cyiza ku rubyiruko kurusha umuganda." Aha, "kurusha" ni ryo jambo rigaragaza ko ugereranya ibyo bikorwa bibiri.

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=conversation-practice. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-conversation-practice-0130-7068048b.

messages.content: Nahisemo gushushanya umukobwa muto mu nkuru yanjye because she is brave.
Ni byiza. A natural full sentence is: "Nahisemo gushushanya umukobwa muto mu nkuru yanjye kuko ari intwari." Muto matches umukobwa. Ni iki gituma uwo mukobwa aba intwari?

reviewer_notes: Reviewer: Tessy Mugisha. Basis: original (reviewer flagged Keep; critic revision declined). task_family=conversation-practice. conversation_id=sft-distill-production-conversation-practice-0134-06f33e48.
